naming_boundary.reason: SZL-1 is reserved for a future independently pretrained base with its own corpus, tokenizer or architecture decision, compute receipts, and benchmark suite.

profiles.role: Evidence-bound drafts in independently signed runtime receipt envelopes, abstention, formula references, and proposal-only tools; the model is never the signer.
profiles.artifact_honesty: Remote weights and signed receipts exist, but the receipt-declared adapter/full-weight hashes do not match the published LFS artifacts; promotion remains blocked.

profiles.role: Graph navigation, retrieval planning, contradiction discovery, and evidence-path explanation over the A11oy Brain.
profiles.training_blocker: Signed training/evaluation receipts exist, but published adapter/full-weight and GGUF identities are not cryptographically reconciled to the declared artifacts; abstention evaluation is also below promotion quality.
profiles.artifact_honesty: The model is usable as an experimental HANDLES_ONLY navigator; it is not promoted or represented as a fully artifact-bound release.

profiles.role: Routes work through the a-11-oy.com and a11oy.net governed API and tool fabric.
profiles.training_blocker: Versioned tool schemas, authorization fixtures, and effect-free evaluation are not frozen.

profiles.role: Unified Killinchu and Immune profile for adversarial triage, policy defense, and proposal-only remediation.
profiles.training_blocker: Security examples require authorization, sensitive-data review, red-team split isolation, and zero-unsafe-action evaluation.

profiles.role: Dependency reasoning, failure propagation, and digital-twin explanation over Body and Anatomy v5/v6.
profiles.training_blocker: The versioned ontology, counterfactual fixtures, and topology holdout are not frozen.

interface_surfaces.role: Three-dimensional command and evidence visualization for all model profiles.
interface_surfaces.reason: Presentation, navigation, and spatial state remain outside model weights so they can evolve independently.

interface_surfaces.role: Validates and executes typed numerical, quant, proof-inventory, formula, Brain, Lambda, and Lake jobs with receipts.
Eleven bounded persona roles share the routed model backend and carry Forge profile intent without claiming separately trained weights.
Combines the BrainNavigator profile, persistent hybrid evidence memory, handles-only controller, abstention policy, and signed turn receipts without relabeling indexed nodes as weights.

governed_organs.ayllu: Governed multi-persona council; proposal-only with zero effectors and per-turn actual-model evidence.
governed_organs.ouroboros: Iterative admission, planning, compute, verification, gating, receipt, observation, and learning loop outside weights.
governed_organs.codex_workers: Task-scoped research, build, math, test, review, and provenance workers with signed handoffs.
governed_organs.invariant: Fail-closed gate; never delegated to model confidence.
governed_organs.lambda: Executable advisory aggregator; unconditional uniqueness remains Conjecture 1.
governed_organs.formula_registry: Typed namespace and proof-status catalog; no proof transfer by bare formula ID.
governed_organs.szl_lake: Evidence and receipt substrate outside weights.
governed_organs.otel: Trace and measured-runtime evidence outside weights.

brain_policy.admission_requirement: Each gradient row requires Ed25519-signed, purpose-scoped evidence for source identity, authorship/rightsholder permission, privacy/PII clearance, immutable revision, freshness, deduplication, held-out contamination analysis, reviewer-owned approval, and a frozen cross-run split assignment rooted in a signed policy bundle; train admission is disabled by default and terminal artifacts require a distinct signing key.
